currency.liveRates: Ibiciro mu UGX hamwe n'ihindurwa ry'ibiciro mu gihe nyacyo ku mafaranga y'akarere.

auth.loginSubtitle: Injira kugira ngo ukurikirane ibicuruzwa byawe kandi wishyure vuba.
auth.signupSubtitle: Jya kuri One Source kugira ngo ubone ibiribwa bishya bitangwa mu Bugande hose.
auth.passwordTooShort: Ijambo ry'ibanga rigomba kuba nibura inyuguti 6.
auth.checkEmail: Reba imeyili yawe kugira ngo wemeze konti yawe, hanyuma winjire.
auth.notConfigured: Kwemeza konti ntibyashyizweho. Ongeraho VITE_SUPABASE_URL na VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY mu dosiye .env ku rwego rw'umushinga (urufunguzo rwa anon ruri mu Supabase → Igenamiterere ry'umushinga → API).
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Andika imeyili yawe tuzohereza umurongo wo guhitamo ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.
auth.resetEmailSent: Niba hari konti y'iyo imeyili, uzahabwa umurongo wo kongera ijambo ry'ibanga vuba.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Andika kandi wemeze ijambo ry'ibanga rishya hepfo.
auth.passwordUpdated: Ijambo ry'ibanga ryawe ryahinduwe. Ushobora kwinjira ukoresheje ijambo ry'ibanga rishya.
auth.resetLinkInvalid: Uyu murongo wo kongera ntushobora gukora cyangwa wararengeje igihe. Saba undi muri gukomeza.

1.title: Pome nshya – Premium, ipaki ya 5
1.description: Pome zikama kandi zisukuye. Nziza ku gufata cyangwa guteka. Abatanga ibicuruzwa b'Ubugande bizeye.
1.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi kuva kuri 100 000 USh

2.title: Amatunda ya Fairtrade – ameze neza, hafi 5
2.description: Amatunda ya Fairtrade yameze neza mu buryo kamere. Nziza kuri smoothie, ifunguro rya mugitondo cyangwa mu nzira.
2.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

3.title: Broccoli nshya – umutwe munini
3.description: Broccoli yuzuye vitamini. Ishobora gutekwa mu mvura, gutetse cyangwa gutetse mu mafuta.
3.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

4.title: Inyanya z'umuzabibu – 450 g
4.description: Inyanya zisukuye zameze neza ku giti. Salade, isosi n'imigati.
4.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

5.title: Salade ya iceberg – ikama
5.description: Salade ikama. Shingiro ryiza rya salade ya Caesar n'iburgeri.
5.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

6.title: Basilic nshya – igikapu cyuzuye
6.description: Igikapu cya basilic cyuzuye. Tora amababi yo gutekeza pasta, pesto n'ibiryo by'Abataliyani.
6.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

7.title: Karoti za kamere – 500 g
7.description: Karoti za kamere zemewe. Zisukuye, zikama, zishobora gutetse cyangwa kunywa nk'umutobe.
7.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

8.title: Avoka ya kamere – yiteguye gufatwa, ipaki ya 2
8.description: Avoka ya Hass ya kamere, yiteguye gufatwa. Toast, salade na guacamole.
8.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

9.title: Ibirayi – guteka, 2 kg
9.description: Ibirayi byinshi byakoreshwa mu buryo butandukanye. Purée iramye, byatetse bikama.
9.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

10.title: Igitunguru cy'umutuku – urutoki rwa 1 kg
10.description: Igitunguru cyoroshye. Salade, curry n'ibyo gutetse mu isukari.
10.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

11.title: Stroberi nshya – agafuka ka 400 g
11.description: Stroberi z'igihe zuzuye umusulo. Ibinyobwa n'ibyo guteka.
11.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

12.title: Blueberry – 150 g
12.description: Blueberry zuzuye antioxidant. Ifunguro rya mugitondo n'igifunguro.
12.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

13.title: Mandarine – nta mirongo, 600 g
13.description: Mandarine zoroshye gupapura. Gufata n'umuti wa C.
13.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

14.title: Indimu – nini, ipaki ya 3
14.description: Indimu zuzuye umusulo zo guteka, guteka imigati n'ibinyobwa.
14.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

15.title: Umuhinwa umeze neza – munini
15.description: Umuhinwa usonewe kandi usukuye. Salade y'imbuto, smoothie cyangwa salade.
15.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

16.title: Inanasi ya zahabu – hagati
16.description: Inanasi ya zahabu y'ibiyaga. Yatetse, yavanywe cyangwa ifatwa bishya.
16.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

17.title: Amavuta ya Conference – 4
17.description: Amavuta ya Conference yuzuye umusulo. Iforomaje cyangwa salade.
17.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

18.title: Courgette nshya – 3
18.description: Courgette zoroshye. Spiral, zatetse cyangwa mu ifuru.
18.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

19.title: Salade ivange – 120 g yisukuye
19.description: Amababi yisukuye: roquette, epinari, frisée. Fungura, fata.
19.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

20.title: Epinari ya kamere – 200 g
20.description: Epinari nto za kamere. Pasta, smoothie cyangwa salade.
20.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

21.title: Igishe – 2
21.description: Igishe cyoroshye. Giteke cyangwa ku muriro.
21.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

22.title: Framboise nshya – 125 g
22.description: Framboise zisonewe. Ibinyobwa, yaourt cyangwa bishya.
22.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

23.title: Pamplemousse ya ruby – 2
23.description: Pamplemousse ya ruby umweru. Ifunguro rya mugitondo ry'umuravumba.
23.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU kuva kuri 100 000 USh

24.title: Passion fruit – 3
24.description: Passion fruit zisonewe. Pavlova, cheesecake cyangwa salade y'ibiyaga.
24.delivery: Gutanga KU BUNTU uyu munsi ejo

product.legalDisclaimerText: Ubusa n'ibikoresho by'ukuri bishobora kuba bifite amakuru menshi kuruta ibyo twerekana ku rubuga rwacu. Ntukizigire gusa amakuru aha; soma buri gihe ibimenyetso, iburira n'uburyo bwo gukoresha mbere yo gukoresha cyangwa gufata.
product.disclaimerText: Ibiri kuri ubu rubuga bitangwa gusa ku makuru. Vugana n'umukora kugira ngo umenye allergènes cyangwa imikoreshereze y'ubuvuzi. One Source Ubugande ntiyifata inshingano ku makosa y'abatanga ibicuruzwa b'undi.
product.reviewsHowItWorks: Isuzuma ry'abaguzi rirafasha kumenya byinshi ku gicuruzwa no kumenya niba kikwiriye.
product.sampleReview1Body: Bishya kandi bihuye n'ibyo byavuzwe. {{product}} byapfunyikiye neza. Ndabishishikariza.
product.sampleReview2Body: Gucuruza byanyuzwe. Byatanzwe ku gihe, ibicuruzwa byakoreshejwe ako kanya.
product.rollOverToZoom: Roll over image to zoom in
product.customersSayNote: Byakozwe ukurikije insanganyamatsiko z'isuzuma ku bicuruzwa bishya bisa.
product.sampleReview3Body: Byageze ku gihe, byapfunyikiye neza. Bihuye n'ibyo byatangajwe.

errors.loadProducts: Ntibyashoboye gupakura ibicuruzwa. Reba server/.env (Supabase) hanyuma ukore: cd server && npm run dev
errors.passwordResetFailed: Could not send password reset email
errors.supabaseNotConfigured: Supabase ntiyashyizweho. Ongeraho VITE_SUPABASE_URL na VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY mu dosiye .env ku rwego rw'umushinga.

shop.setupHint: Shyiraho Supabase muri server/.env, hanyuma ukore cd server && npm run dev

ingredients.sauce: {{name}} (uruhoko, umunyu, umushyushya, amavuta, ibihumyo). Reba ubusa kugira ngo umenye allergènes.

storage.coolDry: Ahantu gakonje kandi gakeye cyangwa mu firigo.
storage.roots: Ahantu gakonje, gatose kandi gafite umwuka. Koresha mu byumweru 2.
storage.chilled: Bika mu firigo 0–4 °C. Reba itariki ku busa.

about.yam1: Ibirayi by'ubwoko byera ni ibiryo by'ibanze muri Afurika no mu Karayibi — ibinyampeke by'ubwoko bifite uruhande rw'umukara n'umubiri wera.
about.yam2: Biteke mu mvura, mu mafuta cyangwa biteketse. Bikunzwe mu fufu, ibirayi by'ubwoko byatetse hamwe n'imyenda n'ibyo guteka.
about.yam3: Menyesha ikibazo cyose ku bicuruzwa bishya mu masaha 24 nyuma yo gutanga.
about.chilli1: Uruhoko rushya — rwiza ku misosi, marinades n'ibiryo by'umuco.
about.chilli2: Bika ahantu gakonje cyangwa mu firigo.
about.chilli3: Menyesha ibibazo by'ubwiza mu masaha 24 nyuma yo gutanga.
about.freshCategory: {{category}} bishya biva ku mirima n'amakoperative y'Ubugande.
about.report24h: Menyesha ibibazo by'ubwiza ku bicuruzwa bishya mu masaha 24 nyuma yo gutanga.
about.primeEligible: Bifite Prime — gutanga uyu munsi ku bicuruzwa bihuye n'ibisabwa.

description.farmFresh: {{name}} bishya biva ku murima binyuze kuri One Source Ubugande.
description.yam1: Ibirayi by'ubwoko byera bishya bifite uruhande rw'umukara n'umubiri wera w'ubwoko. Byarerewe mu butaka bwiza, byatoranijwe kugira ngo biteke.
description.yam2: Biteke mu mvura, mu mafuta cyangwa biteketse. Ikintu cy'ingenzi mu fufu, ibirayi by'ubwoko byatetse n'ibiryo byinshi by'Afurika.
description.yam3: Igicuruzwa cya {{origin}}. Menyesha ibibazo byo gutanga ku bicuruzwa bishya mu masaha 24.

customersSay.freshQuality: Abaguzi babona ko ari bishya kandi bifite ubwiza
customersSay.mixedQuality: Abaguzi bafite ibitekerezo bitandukanye ku bwiza

warranty.p1: Ibiribwa bishya bifite garanti y'ubushya bwacu. Vugana n'itsinda ry'ubufasha mu masaha 24 nyuma yo gutanga niba hari ibyangiritse cyangwa ubwiza budahagije — amafoto niba bishoboka.
warranty.p2: Kugarura amafaranga cyangwa guhindura bitewe n'ubushobozi bwa One Source Ubugande ukurikije politiki yacu yo kugarura.
warranty.p3: Hatariho uburenganzira bw'amategeko, ibicuruzwa byinshi bishobora kugarurwa mu minsi 30 mu bihe bihuye. Reba ibitandukanye.
